title: teucrium quadrifarium var. kouytchense
intro: Teucrium quadrifarium var. kouytchense is a variant of the Teucrium quadrifarium plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Teucrium quadrifarium var. kouytchense are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
